arts.ttl: Nicolas Kuhn has Celtic appetite for Bayern destruction as THAT moment gives him hope the comeback could be on
arts.sum: The Hoops wide man is convinced Celts have the attacking threat to do damage in the Champions League return mission

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers comment pricks Jim Goodwin's ears up as Dundee Utd turn to Bayern blueprint to stun Celtic
arts.sum: Rodgers and Goodwin will do battle in the Premiership again this weekend

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 31: Where things stand with Bayern Munich and Florian Wirtz; Paul Wanner wants assurance; Should Eric Dier and Josip Stanišić get minutes?; and MORE!
arts.sum: This is what we have on tap for this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show: Also, be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane is happy with Bayern Munich’s ability to stay strong amid pressure in UCL win over Celtic, but admits improvement is needed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s victory over Celtic in the Champions League did not come easy. “Whenever you win a game like this, you’re always pleased because it’s not an easy place to come,” Kane explained, via @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Player Ratings Poll: Celtic 1 - 2 Bayern Munich in Champions League play-off
arts.sum: Bayern Munich took home a 2-1 first leg advantage from Celtic Park in a Champions League Round of 16 play-off tie vs. Player ratings [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/Nd5FIj9AIN

arts.ttl: Leverkusen-Bayern has become Bundesliga's definitive fixture
arts.sum: We put our words for international viewers to Bayer Leverkusen's emphatic and richtungsweisend (direction pointing) 3-0 win over Bayern Munich wearing only light jackets, while some fans of die Werkself enjoyed the experience in traditional Karneval costume since the Spitzenspiel (top game) went ahead on the Saturday before Rosenmontag, always a special, celebratory weekend in these parts. Mind games always seem to be a factor when Bayern are involved in a big domestic tussle and perhaps predictably, this was the week when the future of Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz took centre stage in the form of a dream by Bayern's rarely quiet honorary president Uli Hoeness that the 21-year-old sensation might somehow end up in Munich this summer.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany is pleased at Bayern Munich’s good position for the second leg against Celtic
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s 2-1 away win over Celtic in the Champions League will never be labeled as one of the Bavarians’ most brilliant performances, but it put head coach Vincent Kompany’s team in a very good position heading into the second leg. We’re in a good position for the second leg.”
